message:
test(bd-mlo2): add 69 unit tests for oidc.rs

Cover OidcProviderConfig defaults/debug/clone, SigningAlgorithm
copy/eq/debug/clone, UserClaims additional builders and serde,
filter_by_scopes for address and phone scopes, AddressClaim
default/debug/clone/serde, IdTokenClaims debug/clone/serialization,
IdToken debug/clone, DiscoveryDocument new defaults/serde,
OidcError all variants/From trait, OidcProvider accessors/set_hmac_key
/set_claims_fn/jwks/get_id_token/cleanup_expired/auto-key-gen/
userinfo errors/claims-not-found, Arc<dyn ClaimsProvider> delegation,
InMemoryClaimsProvider debug/default/overwrite, validate_oidc_config,
SigningKey default/clone, and helper functions simple_sha256/
hmac_sha256/generate_random_bytes.

Server test count: 865 → 935.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
